campaigns.title: Nourish Families With Dignity
campaigns.summary: Support monthly ration kits and warm meals for families facing hardship.
campaigns.description: This campaign helps Sarab Noor provide essential food support, nutrition kits, and emergency groceries to underserved families. The focus is on dignified relief with transparent distribution and community follow-up.

campaigns.title: Education Support For Young Learners
campaigns.summary: Help provide school supplies, learning access, and compassionate mentoring.
campaigns.description: Sarab Noor supports children with school materials, fee assistance, and volunteer-led learning support so that financial hardship does not interrupt education.
